sidebar.desktopOnly: File tree is available in the desktop app.

fileTree.dropToRoot: Drop here to move into the workspace root folder.
fileTree.deleteMessage: Delete "{{name}}" permanently? Folders will be removed recursively.

validation.same: The item is already in that location.
validation.descendant: A folder cannot be moved into itself or one of its descendants.
validation.exists: An item with the same name already exists.
validation.unknown: The operation could not be completed.

preview.loading: Preview loads on demand to keep startup fast.
preview.externalImageClickToLoad: Click to load from the original host

externalConflict.title: Resolve External File Conflict
externalConflict.description: This file changed on disk while you still have unsaved edits in the editor. Choose which version to keep.
externalConflict.localSubtitle: The current version in the editor.
externalConflict.diskSubtitle: The latest contents detected on disk.
externalConflict.mergedSubtitle: This preview updates as you choose local or disk content for each change block.
externalConflict.changeBlockHint: Choose which side should win for this block.
externalConflict.overwriteHint: Keeping your edits means the next save will overwrite the file on disk.

externalMissing.title: Recover Missing File
externalMissing.description: The original file path is no longer available. You can save the current editor contents somewhere else, keep them as a draft, or close the tab.
externalMissing.currentSubtitle: This is the content currently loaded in the editor.
externalMissing.recoveryHint: Relinking lets you point this tab to a moved file. If the contents differ, you'll get a side-by-side conflict review before overwriting anything.

themePanel.focusWidthHint: Focus Mode only. Presets now target modern high-resolution displays; use Custom when you need to push even further.
themePanel.focusWidthPresetHint: A preset is active now. These widths are intentionally tuned higher for large 2026-era displays and future monitors.
themePanel.focusWidthCustomHint: Manual width for Focus Mode. This range now extends further for ultrawide and 5K/6K-class monitors; use it only when the presets still feel too narrow or too wide.

dialog.unsavedMessage: Do you want to save changes to "{{name}}"?
dialog.openExternalMessage: Open "{{target}}" with your system default app? The editor will stay on the current document.
dialog.browserSavePrompt: Press OK to save changes before closing. Press Cancel for discard options.
dialog.browserDiscardPrompt: Press OK to discard changes and close this tab. Press Cancel to keep the tab open.

notices.openFileErrorMessage: The selected document could not be read.
notices.saveFileErrorMessage: The current document could not be written.
notices.openFolderErrorMessage: The folder contents could not be loaded.
notices.recentFileErrorMessage: The file may have moved or been removed.
notices.recentFileBrowserTitle: Recent files require the desktop app
notices.recentFileBrowserMessage: Reopening recent files is only available in the desktop build.
notices.exportErrorMessage: The document could not be exported.
notices.externalImageLoadErrorMessage: The preview could not load the remote image from {{host}}.
notices.openExternalErrorMessage: The system default app could not open {{target}}.
notices.externalFileReloadedMessage: "{{name}}" changed on disk and was reloaded.
notices.externalFileMergedTitle: Merged changes kept in the editor
notices.externalFileMergedMessage: "{{name}}" now contains your merged version and still needs saving.
notices.externalFileConflictMessage: "{{name}}" changed on disk while you have unsaved edits. Review before saving.
notices.externalFileMissingMessage: "{{name}}" could not be found on disk.
notices.externalFileRelinkErrorMessage: The selected file could not be linked to this tab.
notices.externalFileRelinkAlreadyOpenMessage: "{{name}}" is already open in another tab.
notices.copyHtmlSuccessMessage: The rendered HTML is now on the clipboard.
